title: sceptridium obliquum var. oneidense
intro: Sceptridium obliquum var. oneidense, also known as Eastern American burdock or oneida burdock, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Melanthiaceae and is native to eastern North America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Sceptridium obliquum var. oneidense include treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as supporting kidney function and digestion. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
